width.description: VIEWPORT design width in pixels (the browser frame). 9:16 PORTRAIT (432x768) — the renderer's internal resolution; the canvas is CSS-scaled to FIT. MIRRORS core's fixed-portrait invariant — a module MUST mirror it, never diverge.

height.description: VIEWPORT design height in pixels. 9:16 portrait (432x768) — see width.

pixelArt.description: Render textures with nearest-neighbour scaling (pixel-art look).

gravity.description: Downward acceleration (px/s^2) applied to the avatar's vertical velocity each frame. GravityFlapMovement consumes it. Strong enough for constant pressure, not so strong recovery is impossible (RB §1).

flapImpulse.description: The FIXED upward velocity (px/s, positive magnitude) a flap SETS the avatar's vy to — deterministic, every flap reaches the same height (RB §1).

maxFallSpeed.description: Terminal fall-speed cap (px/s). Without it the avatar drops so fast lower obstacles become unavoidable — the fairness clamp (RB §4).

scrollSpeed.description: Speed (px/s) the world scrolls left past the fixed-x avatar. ObstacleScrollSystem consumes it (~2s reaction window across the canvas).

gapHeight.description: The FIXED vertical gap height (px) between an obstacle pair. MUST be >= avatar height + margin so the avatar always fits (INV-PASSABLE, RB §3).

gapMargin.description: Margin (px) the gap CENTER keeps from the ceiling and the floor band, so no obstacle gap spawns at an unreachable edge (INV-PASSABLE).

spawnEveryPx.description: Horizontal spacing (px) between successive obstacle pairs. Consistent spacing is what makes the procedural stream learnable, not random (RB §1).

seed.description: The deterministic PRNG seed for the gap-center stream. Same seed => the identical obstacle sequence (reproducible, replayable — INV-DETERMINISTIC, RB §3).

controlsHelp: Touching a pipe, the ground, or the ceiling = game over
objective: Flap to thread the gaps and survive as long as you can; your score is the pipes you pass.
